---
title: "3. Sequences"
---

## Learning Goals

- Apply triangle congruence criteria (SSS, SAS, ASA, AAS, HL).
- Use congruent parts of congruent triangles.
- Write clear two-column or paragraph proofs.

## Congruence Criteria

Two triangles are congruent if one of the standard criteria is satisfied.

## Worked Example

Given $AB = DE$, $BC = EF$, and $AC = DF$, conclude:

$$
\triangle ABC \cong \triangle DEF \quad \text{(SSS)}
$$

## Practice

1. Decide whether each set of measurements is enough for congruence.
2. Write a short proof using SAS.
3. Explain why AAA does not prove congruence.
